name: deephome
description: Deephome — intent-based home search. Recover the user's true intent from surface search words, then map it to queryable listing attributes.

scripts.build: tsc demo.ts demo-enrich.ts demo-vision.ts src/globals.d.ts --outDir dist --module commonjs --target es2020 --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop
scripts.build:run: npm run build && node dist/demo.js && node dist/demo-enrich.js && node dist/demo-vision.js
